one transaction was reflected in the Regulation 23(9) disclosure for the half year ended September 30, 2025, pertaining to the sale of the Company’s investment in Mihup Communications Private Limited (“Investee Company”), which is a related party, to an unrelated third party. The said transaction was duly intimated to the Stock Exchange on April 17, 2025.

We respectfully submit that the aforesaid transaction does not fall within the definition of a “related party transaction” as prescribed under Regulation 2(zc) of the SEBI LODR Regulations, since the transaction was undertaken with an unrelated third party. Nevertheless, as Mihup Communications Private Limited qualifies as a related party of the Company, the transaction was inadvertently reported as a related party transaction in the said half-yearly disclosure.

Upon identification of the inadvertent reporting, the Company promptly rectified the same by submitting a revised disclosure for the half year ended September 30, 2025,

Clerical Error in cash flow rectified

In Cashflow the PBT is Rs. 11042.52 and in Financial results it is 12221.52 because it doesn't include Share of Profit of Joint venture as separate line item. Due to the fact that, 

1. As per schedule III of companies Act, the share of profit is part of the other income & consequently, included in to Profit Before Tax.
2. As Abridge Financial Statement, there is separate line item post Profit After Tax for share of Profit. so, it is not added in to Profit Before Tax.
3. Therefore, while calculating the Profit Before Tax for cash flow we have added the share of profit.
